'''Teke Ro''' was a [[Blue giant/Legends|blue giant]] [[Star/Legends|star]] and the primary of the [[Teke Ro system]], located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}}
